title: Frogcrafting Hotbar
description: A cute aesthetic Hotbar featuring frogs and mushrooms, designed for Frogcrafting's Twitch and YouTube channels!
body:
![Separator Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76fd838349e2eefaa42871f42acce22810e9a64e.png)
__A cute Hotbar featuring frogs and flowers, designed for Frogcrafting's [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/frogcrafting) and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@frogcrafting) channels!__

This resource pack only changes the hot-bar, and can be used with other GUI resource packs, simply make sure you've loaded it on top.  
Note that full compatibility is not possible for versions 1.20.1 and below, so in these versions, the button textures have also been modified.

This pack is featured in [Frogcrafting's Hardcore Modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/frogcraftings-hardcore-modpack), check it out!
